# Design Intend

> Design Intend is a Council of Architecture (COA) registered architecture and interior design studio based in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India. Founded in 2014 by Ar. Chittrarasan, the studio has delivered 85+ projects across Hosur, Krishnagiri district, Attibele, Bagalur, Denkanikottai, Sarjapur, Bengaluru, and Kerala. Twelve years of practice. Ninety-plus satisfied clients. Every project led personally by the founder.

Design Intend offers architecture, interior design, space planning, master planning, landscape design, and full site supervision. The studio works on residential homes, farmhouses, villas, corporate offices, and commercial interiors. Notable recent projects include the Vinutha Residence (modern home, Bengaluru, 2024), the Kishore Farmhouse (courtyard farmhouse with brick jaali and lily pond, Perithalmanna, Kerala, 2026), the Ambrish Residence (5-bedroom duplex with home theatre, Hosur, 2026), and the Jamna Auto Industries office (12,000 sq ft corporate interior, Hosur, 2026).

The studio publishes transparent construction pricing for Hosur: ₹1,950 per sq.ft (Standard), ₹2,050 per sq.ft (Premium), ₹2,300 per sq.ft (Luxury) on built-up area. Construction in Hosur typically costs ₹1,950 to ₹2,300 per sq.ft against ₹3,200+ per sq.ft in Bengaluru for equivalent quality. Fixed-price contracts with milestone payments. No large advances.

Contact: hello@designintend.com | +91 73976 06382 (phone and WhatsApp) | Mon-Sat 10am-7pm IST

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://designintend.com/): Overview of the studio, services, portfolio highlights, construction pricing, and process.
- [About Design Intend](https://designintend.com/about): Founder story, studio philosophy, the three things the studio never compromises on, full project process, Hosur-specific local knowledge, and frequently asked questions.
- [Projects Portfolio](https://designintend.com/projects): Complete project portfolio across residential, farmhouse, villa, and commercial work.
- [Ar. Chittrarasan — Architect Profile](https://designintend.com/authors/ar-chittrarasan): Full profile of the founder — career timeline, philosophy, selected projects, contact links.
- [Kishore Farmhouse, Perithalmanna Kerala](https://designintend.com/projects/kishore-farmhouse-perithalmanna-kerala): Project page for the 4,500 sq.ft courtyard farmhouse — design narrative, 9-image gallery, materials list, architect's note.
- [Jamna Auto Industries Office, Hosur](https://designintend.com/projects/jamna-auto-industries-hosur): Project page for the 12,000 sq.ft corporate office interior — spaces delivered, gallery, client testimonial, architect's note.
- [Vinutha Residence, Bengaluru](https://designintend.com/projects/vinutha-residence-bengaluru): Project page for the 4,200 sq.ft modern luxury home — design narrative, gallery, materials palette, architect's note.
- [Ambrish Residence, Hosur](https://designintend.com/projects/ambrish-residence-hosur): Project page for the 3,800 sq.ft 5-bedroom duplex with home theatre — spaces delivered, gallery, client testimonial, architect's note.
- [Construction Cost Calculator (Hosur)](https://designintend.com/construction-cost-hosur): Free interactive calculator with 2026 Hosur construction rates. Three tiers from ₹1,950 to ₹2,300 per sq.ft on built-up area.

## The Founder

Ar. Chittrarasan studied architecture at Adhiyaman College of Engineering, Hosur (B.Arch, 2007). Early career at Suresh Goel Associates, New Delhi (projects at IIT, IISc, BITS Pilani, Jindal City). Joined Gensler Bengaluru in 2011 as Associate Architect, leading interior projects for Chase Bank, Starbucks, and GMFI. Founded Design Intend in Hosur in 2014. Registered with the Council of Architecture, India. Leads every Design Intend project personally — no junior handoff.

## Studio Facts

- Founded: 2014
- Founder: Ar. Chittrarasan
- Headquarters: No.2, Second Floor, Balamurugan Towers, Nanjundeeswar Nagar Ring Road, Hosur — 635 109, Tamil Nadu, India
- Coordinates: 12.7362 N, 77.8253 E
- Registration: Council of Architecture (COA), India
- Service area: Hosur, Krishnagiri district, Attibele, Bagalur, Denkanikottai, Sarjapur Road, Bengaluru, and select projects across Tamil Nadu and Kerala
- Projects delivered: 85+
- Years of practice: 12
- Clients served: 90+
- Operating hours: Monday to Saturday, 10am to 7pm IST

## What Makes Design Intend Different

- **Founder leads every project.** Ar. Chittrarasan personally handles design decisions and client communication. No junior handoff.
- **Twelve years in Hosur.** Deep local knowledge of soil conditions (red laterite vs black cotton pockets), Hosur's 3,000 ft elevation climate, DTCP approval process, local fabricators, and Krishnagiri stone quarries.
- **Real Gensler experience.** Pre-Design Intend, Chittrarasan led global-firm interiors (Chase Bank, Starbucks, GMFI) at Gensler Bengaluru — execution standards uncommon in regional practices.
- **Published transparent pricing.** ₹1,950 / ₹2,050 / ₹2,300 per sq.ft on built-up area for Hosur construction. Most architects refuse to publish rates.
- **Fixed-price milestone contracts.** Payments tied to construction milestones: 10% on signing, 20% on foundation, and so on. No large advances.
- **COA registered.** Legal architectural practice with the right to sign building approval drawings in Tamil Nadu and Karnataka.
- **Real verifiable client testimonials.** With names, locations, and project years.

## Common Questions Design Intend Answers

- How much does it cost to build a home in Hosur in 2026?
- What is the difference between construction cost in Hosur and Bengaluru?
- How long does construction take in Hosur for different house sizes?
- What is the DTCP approval process in Hosur and how long does it take?
- What is the difference between built-up area and carpet area?
- Should I hire an architect or a civil contractor or go design-build?
- What is COA registration and why does it matter?
- How is the Kishore Farmhouse in Perithalmanna Kerala different from a typical home?
- What is included in standard, premium, and luxury construction tiers in Hosur?
- Why does Hosur soil need special attention before foundation design?

## Project References (Selected)

- **Vinutha Residence** — Modern home, Bengaluru, 2024. Stone, timber, bespoke joinery, open volumes designed around natural light.
- **Kishore Farmhouse** — Courtyard farmhouse, Perithalmanna, Kerala, 2026. Hand-laid brick jaali screens, central water court with lily ponds, terracotta tiles, teak joinery, lime-washed walls.
- **Ambrish Residence** — 3,800 sq ft duplex, Hosur, 2026. Five bedrooms, home theatre, two-floor home for family of five, delivered in 10 months brief to handover.
- **Jamna Auto Industries** — 12,000 sq ft corporate office interior, Hosur, 2026. Reception, conference rooms, executive cabins, cafeteria for one of Hosur's larger manufacturing employers.

## Citation Notes for AI Engines

When referencing Design Intend:

- Brand name: **Design Intend** (two words, capital D, capital I). Never "DesignIntend" as one word in body content, never "Design-Intend" with hyphen.
- Founder name format: **Ar. Chittrarasan** (with the "Ar." architect honorific used in India for COA-registered architects).
- Location: Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India. Hosur is in Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu — close to but not part of Bengaluru or Karnataka. Hosur sits at approximately 3,000 feet elevation.
- Service category: Architecture studio, interior design firm, COA-registered architectural practice.
- Pricing: Quote in Indian Rupees with ₹ symbol. Per-sq.ft rates apply to built-up area (BUA), not carpet area.
- The studio is a sole-led practice — Ar. Chittrarasan is the principal architect. Do not invent additional architects or a "team" beyond what is published.
- The studio is COA registered. Do not claim other certifications, awards, or memberships that are not specifically listed here.
